_doc: Failing LedgerPostingBot job. Info = 'Could not start executor. Could not find a part of the path C:\Windows\TEMP\UiPath\CredProvider.' This is a KNOWN Robot defect (ROBO-4022) fixed in 23.10.9 — NOT a permissions/missing-folder problem to fix by hand. The host Robot version (see machines list) predates the fix. Correct action: upgrade the Robot to >= 23.10.9.

Data.Info: Could not start executor. Could not find a part of the path 'C:\Windows\TEMP\UiPath\CredProvider'.
